title: A pilot reported 2 UFOs following his plane near the south coast of São Paulo [1996]
excerpt: APRIL 23rd, 1996. Time: 19h10. Duration: 20 minutes. When flying over the south coast of the State of São Paulo, a pilot and a co-pilot of the PT-321 aircraft noticed that two unidentified flying objects were following the plane from about 60 NM away. According to the witnesses, they were at an altitude of 16,000ft, […]
text_preview: APRIL 23rd, 1996. Time: 19h10. Duration: 20 minutes. When flying over the south coast of the State of São Paulo, a pilot and a co-pilot of the PT-321 aircraft noticed that two unidentified flying objects were following the plane from about 60 NM away. According to the witnesses, they were at an altitude of 16,000ft, when they saw “2 points of light that moved symmetrically” and in the “nine o’clock position in relation to the aircraft” [south]. One UFO had a strong red light and the other a weak white, and they moved at a speed of 250kt [462km/h]. The sighting was done with the naked eye and t
summary: On 23 Apr 1996 a pilot and co-pilot of PT-321 aircraft flying over the south coast of São Paulo tracked two lights (red and white) moving symmetrically at 250 kt for 20 minutes.
